features.name: Hold Breath
features.description: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 21 (5d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Apex aquatic predator with massive damage
tactical_info.positioning: Uses huge size and speed to ram and bite
tactical_info.damage_output: 21 piercing per hit, devastating single attacks
tactical_info.key_abilities: Massive HP pool, extended blindsight (120 ft), high swim speed
tactical_info.weaknesses: Restricted to aquatic environments, large target
tactical_info.synergies: Dominates open water encounters, excellent for naval combat
